title: helichrysum sordidum
intro: Helichrysum sordidum, also known as yellow paper daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Helichrysum sordidum has been used to treat various health conditions, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil can be extracted and used in topical applications, teas, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
